items.name: endorsement
items.description: A letter of recommendation that you’ll need in order to participate in the Gym Challenge.

items.name: pokemon-box-link
items.description: A device that allows you to access the Pokémon storage system. There are some places where it won’t work.

items.name: wishing-star
items.description: A stone found in the Galar region with a mysterious power. It’s said that your dreams come true if you find one.

items.name: dynamax-band
items.description: A Wishing Star has been affixed to it. It lets out a light that allows Pokémon to Dynamax when at a Power Spot.

items.name: fishing-rod--galar
items.description: Use it by the water to fish up various kinds of Pokémon.

items.name: rotom-bike
items.description: This bike can be combined with the Pokémon Rotom to use a turbo boost.

items.name: sausages
items.description: One of the many ingredients that can be used for cooking at your camp. These sausages should be boiled before eating.

items.name: bobs-food-tin
items.description: One of the many ingredients that can be used for cooking at your camp. The tinned food that Bob sells is curiously popular in Galar.

items.name: bachs-food-tin
items.description: One of the many ingredients that can be used for cooking at your camp. The tinned food that Bach sells is curiously popular in Galar.

items.name: tin-of-beans
items.description: One of the many ingredients that can be used for cooking at your camp. When simmered, the beans suffuse a dish with their mild flavor.

items.name: bread
items.description: One of the many ingredients that can be used for cooking at your camp. An indispensable tool for mopping up that extra curry left on your plate.

items.name: pasta
items.description: One of the many ingredients that can be used for cooking at your camp. These flour noodles make for a surprisingly good match with curry.

items.name: mixed-mushrooms
items.description: One of the many ingredients that can be used for cooking at your camp. The chewy texture of the mushrooms transforms any dish they’re added to.

items.name: smoke-poke-tail
items.description: One of the many ingredients that can be used for cooking at your camp. When a Slowpoke’s tail falls off, it grows back quickly.

items.name: large-leek
items.description: One of the many ingredients that can be used for cooking at your camp. Whether this is the kind of vegetable stalk that Farfetch’d like is unknown.

items.name: fancy-apple
items.description: One of the many ingredients that can be used for cooking at your camp. An apple chosen above others. It has spectacular form and a brilliant sheen.

items.name: brittle-bones
items.description: One of the many ingredients that can be used for cooking at your camp. The taste boiled off from the bones is sure to give a dish a light umami taste.

items.name: pack-of-potatoes
items.description: One of the many ingredients that can be used for cooking at your camp. Potatoes help mellow out a spicy taste, to make a dish more mild.

items.name: pungent-root
items.description: One of the many ingredients that can be used for cooking at your camp. Though carelessly picked, these herbs can add a fragrant accent to a dish.

items.name: salad-mix
items.description: One of the many ingredients that can be used for cooking at your camp. The assortment of vegetables looks quite appealing and healthy.

items.name: fried-food
items.description: One of the many ingredients that can be used for cooking at your camp. It’s been a while since it was fried, so it’s gotten greasy.

items.name: boiled-egg
items.description: One of the many ingredients that can be used for cooking at your camp. Even just one boiled egg can really enhance a dish.

items.name: camping-gear
items.description: Everything you need to set up a tent and get cooking in a Wild Area or at a camping spot.

items.name: rusted-sword
items.description: It is said that a hero used this sword to halt a terrible disaster in ancient times. But it’s grown rusty and worn.

items.name: rusted-shield
items.description: It is said that a hero used this shield to halt a terrible disaster in ancient times. But it’s grown rusty and worn.

items.name: fossilized-bird
items.description: The fossil of an ancient Pokémon that once soared through the sky. What it looked like is a mystery.

items.name: fossilized-fish
items.description: The fossil of an ancient Pokémon that once lived in the sea. What it looked like is a mystery.

items.name: fossilized-drake
items.description: The fossil of an ancient Pokémon that once roamed the land. What it looked like is a mystery.

items.name: fossilized-dino
items.description: The fossil of an ancient Pokémon that once lived in the sea. What it looked like is a mystery.

items.name: strawberry-sweet
items.description: A strawberry-shaped sweet. When a Milcery holds this, it will spin around happily.

items.name: love-sweet
items.description: A heart-shaped sweet. When a Milcery holds this, it spins around happily.

items.name: berry-sweet
items.description: A berry-shaped sweet. When a Milcery holds this, it spins around happily.

items.name: clover-sweet
items.description: A clover-shaped sweet. When a Milcery holds this, it spins around happily.

items.name: flower-sweet
items.description: A flower-shaped sweet. When a Milcery holds this, it spins around happily.

items.name: star-sweet
items.description: A star-shaped sweet. When a Milcery holds this, it spins around happily.

items.name: ribbon-sweet
items.description: A ribbon-shaped sweet. When a Milcery holds this, it spins around happily.

items.name: sweet-apple
items.description: A peculiar apple that can make a certain species of Pokémon evolve. It’s exceptionally sweet.

items.name: tart-apple
items.description: A peculiar apple that can make a certain species of Pokémon evolve. It’s exceptionally tart.

items.name: throat-spray
items.description: Raises Sp. Atk when a Pokémon uses a sound-based move.

items.name: eject-pack
items.description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. When the holder’s stats are lowered, it will be switched out of battle.

items.name: heavy-duty-boots
items.description: These boots prevent the effects of traps set on the battlefield.

items.name: blunder-policy
items.description: Raises Speed sharply when a Pokémon misses with a move because of accuracy.

items.name: room-service
items.description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. Lowers Speed when Trick Room takes effect.

items.name: utility-umbrella
items.description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. This sturdy umbrella protects the holder from the effects of rain and harsh sunlight.

items.name: exp-candy-xs
items.description: A candy that is packed with energy. When consumed, it will grant a single Pokémon a very small amount of Exp. Points.

items.name: exp-candy-s
items.description: A candy that is packed with energy. When consumed, it will grant a single Pokémon a small amount of Exp. Points.

items.name: exp-candy-m
items.description: A candy that is packed with energy. When consumed, it will grant a single Pokémon a moderate amount of Exp. Points.

items.name: exp-candy-l
items.description: A candy that is packed with energy. When consumed, it will grant a single Pokémon a large amount of Exp. Points.

items.name: exp-candy-xl
items.description: A candy that is packed with energy. When consumed, it will grant a single Pokémon a very large amount of Exp. Points.

items.name: dynamax-candy
items.description: A candy that is packed with energy. When consumed, it will raise the Dynamax Level of a single Pokémon by one. A higher level means higher HP when Dynamaxed.

items.name: tr00
items.description: A frenetic dance to uplift the fighting spirit. This sharply raises the user’s Attack stat.

items.name: tr01
items.description: The user drops onto the target with its full body weight. This may also leave the target with paralysis.

items.name: tr02
items.description: The target is scorched with an intense blast of fire. This may also leave the target with a burn.

items.name: tr03
items.description: The target is blasted by a huge volume of water launched under great pressure.

items.name: tr04
items.description: The user attacks everything around it by swamping its surroundings with a giant wave.

items.name: tr05
items.description: The target is struck with an icy-cold beam of energy. This may also leave the target frozen.

items.name: tr06
items.description: A howling blizzard is summoned to strike opposing Pokémon. This may also leave the opposing Pokémon frozen.

items.name: tr07
items.description: A powerful low kick that makes the target fall over. The heavier the target, the greater the move’s power.

items.name: tr08
items.description: A strong electric blast crashes down on the target. This may also leave the target with paralysis.

items.name: tr09
items.description: A wicked thunderbolt is dropped on the target to inflict damage. This may also leave the target with paralysis.

items.name: tr10
items.description: The user sets off an earthquake that strikes every Pokémon around it.

items.name: tr11
items.description: The target is hit by a strong telekinetic force. This may also lower the target’s Sp. Def stat.

items.name: tr12
items.description: The user relaxes and lightens its body to move faster. This sharply raises the Speed stat.

items.name: tr13
items.description: The user takes a deep breath and focuses so that critical hits land more easily.

items.name: tr14
items.description: The user waggles a finger and stimulates its brain into randomly using nearly any move.

items.name: tr15
items.description: The target is attacked with an intense blast of all-consuming fire. This may also leave the target with a burn.

items.name: tr16
items.description: The user charges at the target and may make it flinch.

items.name: tr17
items.description: The user temporarily empties its mind to forget its concerns. This sharply raises the user’s Sp. Def stat.

items.name: tr18
items.description: The user drains the target’s blood. The user’s HP is restored by half the damage taken by the target.

items.name: tr19
items.description: The user strikes with a simultaneous three-beam attack. This may also burn, freeze, or paralyze the target.

items.name: tr20
items.description: The user creates a substitute for itself using some of its HP. The substitute serves as the user’s decoy.

items.name: tr21
items.description: An all-out attack that becomes more powerful the less HP the user has.

items.name: tr22
items.description: Unsanitary sludge is hurled at the target. This may also poison the target.

items.name: tr23
items.description: The user lays a trap of spikes at the opposing team’s feet. The trap hurts Pokémon that switch into battle.

items.name: tr24
items.description: The user rampages and attacks for two to three turns. The user then becomes confused.

items.name: tr25
items.description: The user materializes an odd psychic wave to attack the target. This attack does physical damage.

items.name: tr26
items.description: The user endures any attack with at least 1 HP. Its chance of failing rises if it is used in succession.

items.name: tr27
items.description: While it is asleep, the user randomly uses one of the moves it knows.

items.name: tr28
items.description: Using its tough and impressive horn, the user rams into the target with no letup.

items.name: tr29
items.description: The user switches places with a party Pokémon in waiting and passes along any stat changes.

items.name: tr30
items.description: The user compels the target to keep using the move it encored for three turns.

items.name: tr31
items.description: The target is slammed with a steel-hard tail. This may also lower the target’s Defense stat.

items.name: tr32
items.description: The user crunches up the target with sharp fangs. This may also lower the target’s Defense stat.

items.name: tr33
items.description: The user hurls a shadowy blob at the target. This may also lower the target’s Sp. Def stat.

items.name: tr34
items.description: Two turns after this move is used, a hunk of psychic energy attacks the target.

items.name: tr35
items.description: The user attacks in an uproar for three turns. During that time, no Pokémon can fall asleep.

items.name: tr36
items.description: The user attacks by exhaling hot breath on opposing Pokémon. This may also leave those Pokémon with a burn.

items.name: tr37
items.description: The target is taunted into a rage that allows it to use only attack moves for three turns.

items.name: tr38
items.description: The user catches the target off guard and swaps its held item with its own.

items.name: tr39
items.description: The user attacks the target with great power. However, this also lowers the user’s Attack and Defense stats.

items.name: tr40
items.description: The user employs its psychic power to exchange Abilities with the target.

items.name: tr41
items.description: The user launches a kick that lands a critical hit more easily. This may also leave the target with a burn.

items.name: tr42
items.description: The user lets loose a horribly echoing shout with the power to inflict damage.

items.name: tr43
items.description: The user attacks the target at full power. The attack’s recoil harshly lowers the user’s Sp. Atk stat.

items.name: tr44
items.description: The user absorbs a mystical power from space to raise its Defense and Sp. Def stats.

items.name: tr45
items.description: The user attacks by shooting muddy water at opposing Pokémon. This may also lower their accuracy.

items.name: tr46
items.description: The user hardens its body’s surface like iron, sharply raising its Defense stat.

items.name: tr47
items.description: The user slashes the target with huge sharp claws.

items.name: tr48
items.description: The user tenses its muscles to bulk up its body, raising both its Attack and Defense stats.

items.name: tr49
items.description: The user quietly focuses its mind and calms its spirit to raise its Sp. Atk and Sp. Def stats.

items.name: tr50
items.description: The user handles a sharp leaf like a sword and attacks by cutting its target. Critical hits land more easily.

items.name: tr51
items.description: The user vigorously performs a mystic, powerful dance that raises its Attack and Speed stats.

items.name: tr52
items.description: The user tackles the target with a high-speed spin. The slower the user compared to the target, the greater the move’s power.

items.name: tr53
items.description: The user fights the target up close without guarding itself. This also lowers the user’s Defense and Sp. Def stats.

items.name: tr54
items.description: The user lays a trap of poison spikes at the feet of the opposing team. The spikes will poison opposing Pokémon that switch into battle.

items.name: tr55
items.description: The user cloaks itself in fire and charges the target. This also damages the user quite a lot. This attack may leave the target with a burn.

items.name: tr56
items.description: The user lets loose a blast of aura power from deep within its body at the target. This attack never misses.

items.name: tr57
items.description: The target is stabbed with a tentacle, arm, or the like steeped in poison. This may also poison the target.

items.name: tr58
items.description: The user releases a horrible aura imbued with dark thoughts. This may also make the target flinch.

items.name: tr59
items.description: The user slams a barrage of hard-shelled seeds down on the target from above.

items.name: tr60
items.description: The user slashes at the target by crossing its scythes or claws as if they were a pair of scissors.

items.name: tr61
items.description: The user generates a damaging sound wave by vibration. This may also lower the target’s Sp. Def stat.

items.name: tr62
items.description: The target is attacked with a shock wave generated by the user’s gaping mouth.

items.name: tr63
items.description: The user attacks with a ray of light that sparkles as if it were made of gemstones.

items.name: tr64
items.description: The user heightens its mental focus and unleashes its power. This may also lower the target’s Sp. Def stat.

items.name: tr65
items.description: The user draws power from nature and fires it at the target. This may also lower the target’s Sp. Def stat.

items.name: tr66
items.description: The user tucks in its wings and charges from a low altitude. This also damages the user quite a lot.

items.name: tr67
items.description: The user makes the ground under the target erupt with power. This may also lower the target’s Sp. Def stat.

items.name: tr68
items.description: The user stimulates its brain by thinking bad thoughts. This sharply raises the user’s Sp. Atk stat.

items.name: tr69
items.description: The user focuses its willpower to its head and attacks the target. This may also make the target flinch.

items.name: tr70
items.description: The user gathers all its light energy and releases it all at once. This may also lower the target’s Sp. Def stat.

items.name: tr71
items.description: The user whips up a storm of leaves around the target. The attack’s recoil harshly lowers the user’s Sp. Atk stat.

items.name: tr72
items.description: The user violently whirls its vines, tentacles, or the like to harshly lash the target.

items.name: tr73
items.description: The user shoots filthy garbage at the target to attack. This may also poison the target.

items.name: tr74
items.description: The user slams the target with its steel-hard head. This may also make the target flinch.

items.name: tr75
items.description: The user stabs the target from below with sharpened stones. Critical hits land more easily.

items.name: tr76
items.description: The user lays a trap of levitating stones around the opposing team. The trap hurts opposing Pokémon that switch into battle.

items.name: tr77
items.description: The user snares the target with grass and trips it. The heavier the target, the greater the move’s power.

items.name: tr78
items.description: The user strikes everything around it by swamping the area with a giant sludge wave. This may also poison those hit.

items.name: tr79
items.description: The user slams into the target with its heavy body. The more the user outweighs the target, the greater the move’s power.

items.name: tr80
items.description: The user hurls an electric orb at the target. The faster the user is than the target, the greater the move’s power.

items.name: tr81
items.description: The user turns the target’s power against it. The higher the target’s Attack stat, the greater the damage it deals.

items.name: tr82
items.description: The user attacks the target with stored power. The more the user’s stats are raised, the greater the move’s power.

items.name: tr83
items.description: The user teleports using a strange power and switches places with one of its allies.

items.name: tr84
items.description: The user shoots boiling hot water at its target. This may also leave the target with a burn.

items.name: tr85
items.description: The user is roused, and its Attack and Sp. Atk stats increase.

items.name: tr86
items.description: The user shrouds itself in electricity and smashes into its target. This also damages the user a little.

items.name: tr87
items.description: The user crashes into its target while rotating its body like a drill. Critical hits land more easily.

items.name: tr88
items.description: The user slams its target with its flame-covered body. The more the user outweighs the target, the greater the move’s power.

items.name: tr89
items.description: The user attacks by wrapping its opponent in a fierce wind that flies up into the sky. This may also confuse the target.

items.name: tr90
items.description: The user plays rough with the target and attacks it. This may also lower the target’s Attack stat.

items.name: tr91
items.description: Opposing Pokémon are drenched in an odd poisonous liquid. This lowers the Attack, Sp. Atk, and Speed stats of a poisoned target.

items.name: tr92
items.description: The user damages opposing Pokémon by emitting a powerful flash.

items.name: tr93
items.description: The user swings both arms and hits the target. The target’s stat changes don’t affect this attack’s damage.

items.name: tr94
items.description: The user fiercely attacks the target using its entire body.

items.name: tr95
items.description: The user attacks the target’s throat, and the resultant suffering prevents the target from using moves that emit sound for two turns.

items.name: tr96
items.description: The user attacks the enemy with a pollen puff that explodes. If the target is an ally, it gives the ally a pollen puff that restores its HP instead.

items.name: tr97
items.description: The user bites the target with its psychic capabilities. This can also destroy Light Screen and Reflect.

items.name: tr98
items.description: The user slams into the target using a full-force blast of water. This may also lower the target’s Defense stat.

items.name: tr99
items.description: The user attacks by slamming its body into the target. The higher the user’s Defense, the more damage it can inflict on the target.

items.name: tm00
items.description: The target is slugged by a punch thrown with muscle-packed power.

items.name: wishing-piece
items.description: Throw one into a Pokémon Den to attract a wild Dynamax Pokémon.

items.name: cracked-pot
items.description: A peculiar teapot that can make a certain species of Pokémon evolve. It may be cracked, but tea poured from it is delicious.

items.name: chipped-pot
items.description: A peculiar teapot that can make a certain species of Pokémon evolve. It may be chipped, but tea poured from it is delicious.

items.name: hi-tech-earbuds
items.description: Strange earbuds that allow you to freely control the volume of various sounds.

items.name: fruit-bunch
items.description: One of the many ingredients that can be used for cooking at your camp. The syrupy fruits give off a strong tropical feel.

items.name: moomoo-cheese
items.description: One of the many ingredients that can be used for cooking at your camp. Melted cheese can really give a curry some richness.

items.name: spice-mix
items.description: One of the many ingredients that can be used for cooking at your camp. There are over fifty spices contained within this ingredient’s hot flavor.

items.name: fresh-cream
items.description: One of the many ingredients that can be used for cooking at your camp. Add some whipped cream to a spicy curry to give it some sweetness.

items.name: packaged-curry
items.description: One of the many ingredients that can be used for cooking at your camp. Using packaged curry helps make sure there are no slipups when cooking.

items.name: coconut-milk
items.description: One of the many ingredients that can be used for cooking at your camp. The refined sweetness of this coconut milk makes it quite popular.

items.name: instant-noodles
items.description: One of the many ingredients that can be used for cooking at your camp. It has a junk-food sort of taste, but it goes well with curry.

items.name: precooked-burger
items.description: One of the many ingredients that can be used for cooking at your camp. If you’re unsure about what to cook, you can’t go wrong with some burger.

items.name: gigantamix
items.description: One of the many ingredients that can be used for cooking at your camp. A mysterious spice. Even a tiny sprinkle is sure to make a curry gigantic.

items.name: wishing-chip
items.description: Toss a number of them into a Pokémon Den for the chance to attract a wild Dynamax Pokémon.

items.name: rotom-bike--water-mode
items.description: This bike can be combined with the Pokémon Rotom to not only do a turbo boost but also run on the water.

items.name: catching-charm
items.description: Holding it is said to increase the chance of getting a critical catch. Curiously, the charm doesn’t shake much.

items.name: old-letter
items.description: A letter entrusted to you by a girl, to be delivered to a boy. Strangely, it looks old to you.

items.name: band-autograph
items.description: It’s signed by all members of the Galar region’s most charismatic band, the Maximizers.

items.name: sonias-book
items.description: Professor Sonia’s published writings. Her new discoveries about the Galar region’s legends are recorded in this enjoyable read.

items.name: rotom-catalog
items.description: A catalog of devices that Rotom like. Use the catalog to have Rotom hop in and out of the various devices listed within.

items.name: max-honey
items.description: Honey that Dynamax Vespiquen produces. Adding this honey to Max Soup makes the taste very smooth. It also has the same effect as a Max Revive.

items.name: max-mushrooms
items.description: Mushrooms that have the power of changing Dynamax forms. They boost all stats of a Pokémon during battle.

items.name: galarica-twig
items.description: A twig from a species of tree called Galarica that grows in certain areas around the Galar region. It’s a material for an accessory for a certain Pokémon.

items.name: galarica-cuff
items.description: A cuff made from woven-together Galarica Twigs. Giving it to Galarian Slowpoke makes the Pokémon very happy.

items.name: style-card
items.description: A card that increases the selection in boutiques and hair salons.

items.name: armor-pass
items.description: A pass to go to the Isle of Armor. Show it to the rail staff at Wedgehurst Station.

items.name: rotom-bike--sparkling-white
items.description: This bike can do a turbo boost and run on the water using Rotom’s power. It’s a sparkling white that shines brilliantly.

items.name: rotom-bike--glistening-black
items.description: This bike can do a turbo boost and run on the water using Rotom’s power. It’s a glistening black that shines reddish-black.

items.name: exp-charm
items.description: A charm that increases the Exp. Points that Pokémon can get. A machine-like object is inside the charm.

items.name: armorite-ore
items.description: Rare ore that can be obtained on the Isle of Armor. Something good will happen if you give it to a collector on the Isle of Armor.

items.name: mark-charm
items.description: A mysterious and unique charm that increases the chance of finding a Pokémon with a mark.

items.name: reins-of-unity--merge
items.description: Reins that people presented to the king. They enhance Calyrex’s power over bountiful harvests and unite Calyrex with its beloved steed.

items.name: reins-of-unity--split
items.description: Reins that people presented to the king. They enable those who are connected to communicate with each other. The reins separate Calyrex and its beloved steed.

items.name: galarica-wreath
items.description: A wreath made from woven-together Galarica Twigs. Placing it on the head of a Galarian Slowpoke makes the Pokémon very happy.

items.name: legendary-clue-1
items.description: A clue about the King of Bountiful Harvests. It’s written by Peony, and an old photo is attached to it.

items.name: legendary-clue-2
items.description: A clue about the legend of giants. It’s written by Peony and has unique drawings.

items.name: legendary-clue-3
items.description: A clue about the legend of bird Pokémon. It’s written by Peony and has a unique drawing.

items.name: legendary-clue-question
items.description: A mysterious clue that Peony seems to have dropped. There’s a photo attached to it showing a shining hole opening above the Max Lair.

items.name: crown-pass
items.description: A pass to go to the Crown Tundra. Show it to the rail staff at Wedgehurst Station.

items.name: wooden-crown
items.description: A mysterious object made of wood. Part of it seems to be chipped. Maybe it’s meant to be part of something.

items.name: radiant-petal
items.description: A single petal that the King of Bountiful Harvests gave you. It radiates faint light.

items.name: white-mane-hair
items.description: Mane hair that belonged to the King of Bountiful Harvests’ beloved steed, Glastrier. The hair is strong and very flexible.

items.name: black-mane-hair
items.description: Mane hair that belonged to the King of Bountiful Harvests’ beloved steed, Spectrier. The hair is very smooth to the touch.

items.name: iceroot-carrot
items.description: Produce that the King of Bountiful Harvests’ beloved steed likes to eat. It grew in a field covered in snow.

items.name: shaderoot-carrot
items.description: Produce that the King of Bountiful Harvests’ beloved steed likes to eat. It grew in a gloomy field.

items.name: dynite-ore
items.description: Mysterious ore that can be obtained in the Max Lair. Something good will happen if you give it to a collector in the Crown Tundra.

items.name: carrot-seeds
items.description: Seeds to plant in a field. The kind of carrot you’ll get is determined by which field you plant the seeds in.

items.name: ability-patch
items.description: A patch that allows a Pokémon with a regular Ability to have a rare Ability.

items.name: reins-of-unity
items.description: Cords that shine when you hold them up to the light. The people of old times presented these to the King of Bountiful Harvests to express their gratitude.

items.name: linking-cord
items.description: Allows a Pokemon whose evolution is usually triggered by trading to evolve

items.name: laheavy-ball
items.description: Doesn't fly far, but is more effective if the Pokémon hasn't noticed the player.

items.name: laleaden-ball
items.description: Upgraded version of the Heavy Ball. Doesn't fly far, but is more effective if the Pokémon hasn't noticed the player.

items.name: lagigaton-ball
items.description: Upgraded version of the Leaden Ball. Doesn't fly far, but is more effective if the Pokémon hasn't noticed the player.

items.name: lafeather-ball
items.description: Can be thrown further than a regular Poké Ball. Is more effective for catching Pokémon that fly high in the air.

items.name: lawing-ball
items.description: Can be thrown further than a Feather Ball. Is more effective for catching Pokémon that fly high in the air.

items.name: lajet-ball
items.description: Can be thrown further than a Wing Ball. Is more effective for catching Pokémon that fly high in the air.
